state.next-action:
Session 2026-04-17a — phase 45 wave 2 advancing. TRACK 3 + 45-04 + 45-01 + 45-02 DONE.
DONE this session: - 42.4-21: /how-it-works pressure live-example card (TRACK 3) — P=173.41 from phase 42.2, computed from self-eval.json. - 45-04: site/lib/vocabulary.ts rewritten as full single-source vocabulary catalogue (gad-166, gad-169, gad-189, gad-219). 18/18 smoke checks pass. - 45-01: Project detail tab shell closure. Tabs now sourced from VOCAB.tabs (removes hardcoded labels, first consumer of 45-04). Planning sub-tab state persists in URL via `?sub=` (tasks default omits param). New data-cid on each sub-tab button. Decisions/roadmap sub-panes still show "coming soon" with follow-up refs (45-07, 45-08). - 45-02: Per-project data adapter closure. Adapter already read tasks/decisions/phases/requirements/state; this task added notes. New `PlanningNote` type, `notes: PlanningNote[]` on `ProjectPlanningData`, standalone `loadProjectNotes()`, `collectNotes()` walker over `.planning/notes/` + `.planning/docs/` (.md/.mdx, title from first H1 or filename, 220-char snippet, mtime ISO). Smoke test against `get-anything-done`: 389 tasks, 221 decisions, 51 phases, 17 notes, state.currentPhase=42.4. Unblocks 45-06..11 migrations.
Phase 45 progress: 45-01, 45-02, 45-04, 45-15 done. Remaining: 45-03 (API routes), 45-05 (epigraphs), 45-06..11 (tab component migrations — now unblocked), 45-07 (decisions sub-pane wire — adapter ready), 45-08 (roadmap sub-pane wire — adapter ready), 45-12..21.
NEXT candidates (by dependency): - 45-03 per-project API routes — /api/dev/evals/projects/[id]/planning + /system. Small. The planning route partly exists but should now consume the 45-02 adapter instead of duplicating logic. - 45-07 decisions sub-pane wire — ProjectPlanningDecisionsTab already exists as a file, just not wired. Needs to call through to loadProjectDecisions or the existing fetch path. Small. - 45-08 roadmap sub-pane wire — ProjectPlanningRoadmapTab same story. Small. - 45-06 tasks migration — ProjectPlanningTasksTab already wired; 45-06's goal is to feed it via the 45-02 adapter. Small. - 45-05 Art of War epigraphs — independent, pairs with 45-16 later. Small.
Recommended next: 45-07 + 45-08 (wire the two placeholder panes). Closes the "coming soon" holes users hit on /projects/[...id]?tab=planning&sub=decisions / ?sub=roadmap.
After 45 lands: 44.5 editor → 44 project-market wave 2 → TRACK 2 VCS portability spawn.
NEW THIS SESSION — operator design drop (captured, not implemented): - Decision gad-226 (planning artifacts as gauges — human-facing display, not human-facing content; semantic mapping: decisions=direction, tasks=implementation, requirements=what-to-build, notes=exploration; sweet spots beat maxes; imbalance flags are the UX signal; scope = project/species/generation editor banks). - Decision gad-227 (listing visibility — public by default, per-project listingVisibility booleans on project.json for tasks/decisions/roadmap/requirements/notes/state; moderation tooling overrides owner config). - Decision gad-228 (multi-agent selector in the editor — Claude Code / Codex / OpenCode picked via dropdown; detection at mount; TRACE.json runtime records selection per gad-28). - Note `.planning/notes/roadmap-artifact-question-2026-04-16.md` — OPEN QUESTION: roadmap artifact future (keep-as-is / kill-and-fold-into-tasks / reframe-as-workflow-instances / demote-drop-gauge). Recommended: Option D (demote for now, revisit after gauges ship). - Todos: planning-artifact-gauges, listing-visibility-config, moderation-tooling, editor-agent-selector.
TODOS (19) remain parked: vcs-video-and-primitives, vcs-primitives-redesign, gad-generate-commands, desktop-client-and-skill-authoring, decentralized-auto-contributor, context-framework-builder-project, site-content-gaps, species-tracking-and-showcase, site-article-parallel-subagent-cost, structural-parallelism-task-outbox, lightweight-agent-and-scoped-snapshot, editor-ux-and-platform, generate-publish-play-pipeline (blocking), media-service-infra, site-as-project-template, planning-artifact-gauges (NEW), listing-visibility-config (NEW), moderation-tooling (NEW), editor-agent-selector (NEW).
OPEN QUESTION: roadmap artifact — see note. Awaits operator direction before next implementation cycle touching gauge UI or roadmap tooling.
